stability_analysis.rationale: Perfect chemistry validity across all seeds. Pocket fit shows acceptable variance. Primary flow claims supported by multi-seed evidence.

acceptance_criteria_met: ✓ Aggregated mean/std/CI computed for claim metrics
✓ Primary flow claims supported by multi-seed evidence
✓ Stability decision: STABLE for claim review
summary: Multi-seed stability experiment confirms flow matching reliability. Perfect chemistry validity (1.0 across seeds) with controlled pocket-fit variance (0.85±0.09) demonstrates reproducibility. Ready for matched-budget method comparison (F4.2).
drug_level_summary_note: Aggregates mean/std/min/max/ci95 for available docking, drug-likeness, scaffold, and interaction metrics; missing backend coverage is reported per seed.
